notes:
Finnaly, this game run!!!  No graphical glitches os issues detect in my tests.

 Go to <path-to-game>\data\video\
Delete or rename Logo505.wmv

black screen window open/close error when launching game gone and game will run.

title: Marlow Briggs and the Mask of Death

notes: Game runs very well, but first it is necessary to delete the video file with the initial logo. Go to: path-to-game> \ data \ video \ Delete or rename Logo505.wmv
title: Marlow Briggs and the Mask of Death

notes: As mentioned by others, the 505 wmv file needs to be renamed to get the game to fully load. However, the other wmv videos in the same directory cause the game to crash just before the end of the game. You won't be able to get the achievement for completing the game or closing credits one either. Add a .bak to all the videos and you'll be able to play all the way through. You'll miss out on the 2 ending cutscenes though and will have to watch the 2 non ESRB videos afterward - aztec one last.
title: Marlow Briggs and the Mask of Death
